full_text:
Kan Ze (Derun) 闞澤 (德潤)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Kan Ze (闞澤), styledDerun (德潤). Delivered Huang Gai’s false letter of defection to Cao Cao. Kan Ze was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom.
